error_signature: attachment sent as binary instead of PDF
title: PDF attachment sent as binary in Send Email node
symptom: When using the Send Email node to attach a PDF, the recipient receives it as a binary file instead of a PDF attachment.
not_this_if: Using Gmail node to send the same PDF
root_cause: The Send Email node requires the filename to include the '.pdf' suffix to correctly identify the file type. If the filename does not end with '.pdf', it may be treated as a binary file, leading to incorrect attachment behavior.
fix_steps: Open the node where the PDF file is being prepared.
Ensure the filename field includes '.pdf' at the end.
Save the workflow and test sending the email again.
agent_instruction: Add '.pdf' to the end of the filename in the Send Email node.
